name: GitHub for Startups
summary: GitHub for Startups offers startup-friendly pricing on GitHub Enterprise, Advanced Security, and support.
benefits: Up to 20 seats of GitHub Enterprise free for one year
Up to 20 seats of GitHub Advanced Security 50% off for one year
Access to exclusive events and resources
Unlimited free public and private repositories
eligibility: Early-stage startup that has received outside equity funding (Series B or earlier)
New to GitHub Enterprise and/or Advanced Security
